title: Wandering Ribbit
description: Addon mod of Ribbits that add the wandering ribbit
body:
Adds the wandering ribbit, a little frog that you can trade items for a good price.

Trades: 

- The "Ribbit Map" when you right click on it you will get a map that will guide you to the nearest ribbit village.
- The "Umbrella Leaf" use it to protect from the rain or when you are falling.

If you have any idea put it on comments.

## Configuration

In the 3.0 update now you can configure the spawn ratio of wandering ribbit. 
The config file is in the config folder on .minecraft folder.

Dependencies:

- Ribbits:  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ribbits
- GeckoLib: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib
- YUNG's API: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-api-neoforge

Credits:
The original Ribbits mod creators:
- Josh/Joosh - Art
- yungnickyoung - Coding
- HellionGames - Coding
- scratchy_sd - Sounds
- wesleybenjamin - Music
- joakota - Builds
- joshesque - Logo

Also this mod have compatibility with my other mod [Barri´s Botany](https://modrinth.com/mod/barris-botany), adding a new trade.

This mod was made on mcreator.
